summary: End-to-end testing of Meeting Room Booking MVP complete. Backend: 25/25 pytest cases pass (auth, rooms CRUD, bookings with overlap/past-date/capacity/inactive validation, admin stats, RBAC). Frontend: 14/14 Playwright flows pass (admin login -> dashboard, register -> rooms, room search/filter, booking dialog submit -> pending, my-bookings cancel, admin approve, admin rooms add/edit/delete, non-admin blocked from /admin, logout clears rb_token).
critical_code_review_comments: Auth uses Bearer JWT (HS256) only; httpOnly cookie is read on the server but never set on /auth/login. If the playbook requires httpOnly cookies for CSRF/XSS protection, set the cookie on login/register responses.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook expects lockout after 5 failed attempts). Currently unlimited attempts return 401.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True. Browsers reject this combination for credentialed requests. If cookie auth is added, set explicit origin(s).
Past-date check uses datetime.fromisoformat(date+'T'+start) compared with naive datetime.now(); works but is timezone-naive. Document the intended timezone (server local).

PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status does not re-check overlap when transitioning from cancelled -> confirmed; could create a double-booking edge case if admin reactivates a cancelled booking and another pending overlaps it.
PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status accepts 'pending' which lets admin demote a confirmed booking back to pending (probably unintentional).
/api/auth/logout is a no-op stateless endpoint; fine for Bearer JWT but no token revocation/blacklist.
BookingCreate has no max length on title/notes; consider Field(max_length=...) to prevent abuse.
test_credentials: Admin admin@roombook.com / Admin@123 (seeded). Test users created on the fly with TEST_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: No additional seed required; 6 sample rooms and admin user are auto-seeded at startup. Tests created TEST_ prefixed users, rooms, and bookings (some left in DB for inspection; admin can clean from /admin).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 25 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py pass. Frontend flows all green using REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. data-testid coverage is good across Login, Register, Rooms, BookingDialog, MyBookings, Admin Dashboard/Bookings/Rooms. If retesting after auth playbook fixes (cookies/lockout), update backend_test.py to assert Set-Cookie header and 429/423 after 5 bad logins.
